name: Ham Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds ham (smoked boneless), about 6 cups diced
1 small green bell pepper, cored and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, relish, salt, and pepper until blended.
2. Add the diced ham, onion, green bell pepper, and celery to the bowl.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Cover and refrigerate the salad until ready to serve.
